description: M-3 pin: facts_about(as_of=t, include_retracted=True) MUST still apply the assertion-time filter asserted_at<=t. `include_retracted` lifts ONLY the retracted-exclusion clause, NOT the believed-as-of predicate (§1.2). Setup: sonet->Sonet asserted @T0; correct_fact->Sonnet asserted @T0+HOUR (retracts Sonet at T0+HOUR, superseded_by the user replacement). Before the fix the as_of predicate was built only in the not-include_retracted branch, so as_of was silently ignored when include_retracted=True, leaking the Sonnet replacement (asserted an hour AFTER as_of) into the audit view (time-travel leak). Expected: as_of=T0+1 include_retracted=True returns ONLY Sonet (Sonnet not yet asserted); as_of=T0+HOUR+1 include_retracted=True returns BOTH (Sonnet first then Sonet — facts_about total order is valid_from ASC, predicate ASC, id ASC; both share valid_from and predicate, and the user Sonnet id sorts before the deterministic Sonet id, matching cv-004's proven tiebreak). fact_count 3 = 1 session.occurred + retracted det Sonet + open user Sonnet.
